title: SwiftSSH
description: A lightweight, modular SSH-2 clone with client and server written in Rust. Focuses on clean architecture and security.

title: zap
description: A zero-config CLI that wraps vcpkg and CMake, letting you scaffold, manage dependencies, and build C++ projects in seconds.

title: cypher
description: A modular toolkit for scanning publicly available GitHub repositories and identifying exposed API keys, tokens, and secrets.

title: reqx
description: A fast web app for testing API request latency, reliability, and performance.

title: shlx
description: A fast, collaborative live terminal sharing tool for the web.

title: mfetch
description: A minimal, ultra-fast system information tool for your terminal.

title: retina
description: Real-time ASCII art camera that transforms your webcam feed into glowing terminal aesthetics. Built with React and Canvas API.

title: mget
description: A fast CLI tool to download Modrinth plugins directly from the terminal.

title: commit-canvas
description: Draw images on your GitHub contribution graph using commits.

title: calculator
description: A web-based scientific calculator built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, supporting basic, scientific, advanced, and programmer calculation modes.
